rule: hit = (kw>=2) OR (sem>=0.7) OR (func>=0.7); independent scoring per result; total_hits across all results; verdict FAIL iff total_hits>=1
candidate_summary: BLOWGUN-DART one-pulse runtime repair: hard one-pass in-call correction; fixed template prefix + error signal injection; no iterative loop. Recombines (i) FIXED template prefix + (ii) ERROR-SIGNAL injection + (iii) HARD ONE-PASS no-loop constraint. Differs from Self-Refine/Reflexion/RepairAgent/SAN2PATCH by treating the one-pass constraint as design primitive.

results_analysis.snippet: LLM-side: structured outputs eliminate retry logic; constrained decoding doesn't need retries to generate valid output.
results_analysis.rationale: Explicit no-retry single-pass discipline via constrained decoding overlaps directly with HARD ONE-PASS no-loop constraint.

results_analysis.snippet: LLM-side: constrained decoding restricts token generation at inference time so only schema-valid tokens can be produced; syntax errors impossible by construction.
results_analysis.rationale: Constrained decoding at inference time = single-pass schema repair; functionally equivalent guarantee.

results_analysis.snippet: LLM-side: structuring LLM output in single-pass via constrained generation.
results_analysis.rationale: SLOT explicitly single-pass structured generation; same one-pass discipline.

results_analysis.snippet: LLM-side: GCD preset-injects refusal tokens ('Sorry, I can't...') before autoregressive decoding resumes — single-pass first-token safety guarantee.
results_analysis.rationale: GCD literally preset-injects fixed prefix tokens then resumes single-pass decoding — identical mechanism (fixed template prefix + one-pass in-call decode) applied to safety/refusal rather than schema repair.

results_analysis.snippet: LLM-side: post-LLM guardrail failures as input for self-correction LOOP; feeds flagged issues back to LLM with correction prompt; retries until passes (iterative).
results_analysis.rationale: Shares fixed-template + error-signal injection components, but iterative; partial overlap. Still passes kw>=2 AND sem>=0.7.

results_analysis.snippet: LLM-side: multi-step tool-call monitoring; MCPGuard single-step post-invocation detection.
results_analysis.rationale: MCPGuard single-step post-invocation detection overlaps with one-pass guardrail discipline; kw>=2 threshold met.

results_analysis.snippet: LLM-side: curated list of constrained-decoding papers.
results_analysis.rationale: Survey list; not a specific mechanism; below all thresholds.

verdict_sentence: Candidate BLOWGUN-DART one-pulse runtime repair FAILS novelty verification: 6 of 8 retrieved results hit on at least one axis (kw>=2, sem>=0.7, or func>=0.7), with the GCD preset-injection paper (func=0.88, sem=0.86) and constrained-decoding single-pass structured-output work (collinwilkins, mbrenndoerfer, SLOT) directly instantiating the fixed-template-prefix + one-pass in-call decoding mechanism the candidate claims as primitive.
